title: Lucid Motors Q4 2024 Earnings Summary
text: Lucid Motors Q4 2024 Earnings Summary. Deliveries & Production. Q4 Deliveries: 3,099 vehicles (79% YoY increase). Full Year 2024 Deliveries: 10,241 vehicles (71% YoY increase). Q4 Production: 3,386 vehicles. Full Year 2024 Production: 9,029 vehicles (met guidance of ~9,000). Financial Metrics. Q4 Revenue: $234.5 million. Full Year 2024 Revenue: $807.8 million. Q4 Net Loss Per Share (GAAP): $(0.22). Full Year Net Loss Per Share (GAAP): $(1.25). Ending Liquidity: $6.13 billion. 2025 Guidance. Production Target: Approximately 20,000 vehicles. Leadership Changes. Marc Winterhoff was appointed Interim CEO, while founder Peter Rawlinson transitioned to Strategic Technical Advisor. The company noted four consecutive quarters of record deliveries in 2024.
